infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to provide emergency services and track movement patterns for health monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses location to provide emergency services and track movement patterns for health monitoring.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses microphone for voice commands and emergency communication.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: This app reads and writes health data to provide comprehensive health monitoring.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app shares health data with your care team with your consent.
